11417.title: African Voices Changemakers
11417.description: A Kenyan producer is on a mission to make the superhero genre more inclusive; the visionary behind the South Africa's first superhero comic book series.

56974.title: African Voices Changemakers
56974.description: Uplifting young girls in Ghana by teaching them to code and become leaders, and in Sierra Leone, efforts to develop early childhood education and mental health access.
